Panama · M03 · 5:40
Costa del Este — hold the unit through a foundation, not personally. Ask Javier re: rental income.
US Tax · M02 · 11:20
FDAP vs ECI — the $60K NRA estate exemption is the trap. Blocker corp before any US situs asset.

The Inner Circle · in plain terms
No surprises. Ever.
What you get
The Vault, Ask Javier, Insider Alerts, priority AMAs, early course access.
What’s free
Community feed, the weekly newsletter, course previews — always.
Can you cancel?
Anytime, in the app, in one tap. No phone calls, no maze.
What happens to your data?
Kept. Read-only if you ever lapse — your notes are never deleted.
Can you pause?
Yes — for 1, 2, or 3 months. Pick up where you left off.
